final:
// // This module converts a 5-bit binary input to a 3-bit binary output indicating the temperature status.
// Input range: 0-31°C
// Output codes: 000 (Low), 001 (Medium), 010 (High), 111 (Invalid)

module temperature_sensor(
    input [4:0] temp,
    output reg [2:0] status
);

always @(*) begin
    if (temp <= 5'd15) begin
        status = 3'b000; // Low
    end else if (temp <= 5'd25) begin
        status = 3'b001; // Medium
    end else if (temp <= 5'd31) begin
        status = 3'b010; // High
    end else begin
        status = 3'b111; // Invalid
    end
end

endmodule
